name: Oleander Cycles
description: Bermuda's largest scooter and electric minicar rental operator — the first stop for visitors who want to explore independently. Tourists cannot rent cars in Bermuda, so scooters (from ~$55/day) and Renault Twizy electric minicars (from ~$70/day for two people) are the go-to. Oleander includes a helmet, lock, rain gear, and an orientation on left-hand driving. Locations in Hamilton, Paget (Elbow Beach), and Southampton (Fairmont).
